name: Souper Leftovers
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 oz low-fat cream of mushroom soup
1 tbsp skim milk or more if needed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine turkey, mixed vegetables, onions, bell peppers.
2. Add the cream of mushroom soup and milk to the bowl.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Serve hot on toasted bread slices.
